Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
All laboratory values are within normal limits except for mildly elevated chloride and slightly decreased total CO₂, which may suggest a mild metabolic acidosis or compensation. Renal function, glucose control, and lipid profile are unremarkable. No evidence of significant renal impairment or diabetes. Overall, results are stable and unremarkable for this age group; clinical correlation is advised.
